item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":0,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":false,"emergency_constraint_present":false,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":false,"post_exception_closure_required":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.9,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"supervisors reassigned a dawn shift, exchanged the haul cart, and moved the weigh-in window"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"Now hang a caution notice beside the loading ramp."}],"abstain_reason":"Only one supplied turn lists operational changes and a notice request; it does not state a recurring same-class symptom, failed prior local repairs, or a concrete emergency exception."}
